articles.title: Mass. town warns of ‘neurological symptoms’ spotted in animals
articles.description:
“While we do not feel there is a need to panic, please be cautious when allowing pets outside and please do not leave them outside unattended," animal control said.

The post Mass. town warns of ‘neurological symptoms’ spotted in animals appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Animal control in Massachusetts warns of neurological symptoms in local animals.
Residents advised to supervise pets outdoors to prevent potential risks.
No immediate panic required, but caution is urged for pet safety.

articles.title: Markey wins Mass. Democrats’ endorsement as Moulton clears ballot hurdle in Senate race
articles.description:
Markey won nearly 73% of the delegates' support, while Moulton won nearly 27% of the vote.

The post Markey wins Mass. Democrats’ endorsement as Moulton clears ballot hurdle in Senate race appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Markey secures nearly 73% of delegates' support for Senate endorsement.
Moulton receives approximately 27% of the vote, clearing ballot hurdle.
Boston residents may see a competitive Senate race impacting local policies.

articles.title: Graham Platner’s wife calls reports about Senate candidate’s sexually explicit texts with women ‘shameful’
articles.description:
Platner is seeking the Democratic nomination for Maine's closely-watched Senate race.

The post Graham Platner’s wife calls reports about Senate candidate’s sexually explicit texts with women ‘shameful’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Graham Platner's wife criticized reports of his sexually explicit texts as 'shameful'.
Platner is a candidate for the Democratic nomination in Maine's Senate race.
The controversy may influence voter perceptions in the upcoming election.

articles.title: Red Sox break through with 6 runs in the 7th to defeat Guardians 9-4
articles.description:
Everyone in Boston's lineup had at least one hit as it finished with 12. Jarren Duran had a leadoff homer for the Red Sox.

The post Red Sox break through with 6 runs in the 7th to defeat Guardians 9-4 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox scored 6 runs in the 7th inning to win 9-4 against the Guardians.
Jarren Duran hit a leadoff homer, contributing to the team's 12 total hits.
This victory boosts team morale and engages local fans in Boston's baseball culture.

articles.title: ‘It’s a special feeling’: Mickey Gasper never gave up on his Major League dream, and now he’s reaping the rewards
articles.description:
"It still feels surreal to me," said his mother, Livia Tumin-Gasper. “I can’t believe it."

The post ‘It’s a special feeling’: Mickey Gasper never gave up on his Major League dream, and now he’s reaping the rewards appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mickey Gasper achieved his Major League dream, debuting with the Boston Red Sox.
His mother, Livia Tumin-Gasper, expressed disbelief and pride in his accomplishment.
Gasper's success inspires local athletes pursuing their dreams in Boston.
